name: opencode-sync
description: Cross-machine session + config sync for opencode, coordinated through a self-hosted server on your VPS.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd shared build && bun run --cwd plugin build && bun run --cwd server build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd shared typecheck && bun run --cwd plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd server typecheck
